title: Checkout returns 500 intermittently
symptom: Customers report checkout failing with a generic error about 1 in every 20 attempts. Doesn't reproduce locally. Started sometime after Tuesday's deploy.
defaultSqlQuery:
SELECT order_id, status, retry_count, created_at
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'PENDING'
  AND created_at < now() - interval '2 minutes'
ORDER BY retry_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

logs.message: connection-pool: timed out waiting for connection (order_id=88213)

files.label: OrderService.java
files.contentHtml: public class OrderService { public Order createOrder(OrderRequest req) { // acquires a connection for the WHOLE retry sequence below try (Connection conn = pool.acquire()) { PaymentResult result = paymentClient.charge(req, conn); return orderRepo.save(req, result, conn); } } }

files.label: PaymentClient.java
files.contentHtml: public class PaymentClient { public PaymentResult charge(OrderRequest req, Connection conn) { return retryPolicy.execute(() -> { return stripe.charge(req.amount(), 5000); }); // note: conn is held open across every retry attempt } }

files.label: RetryPolicy.java
files.contentHtml: public class RetryPolicy { private static final int MAX_ATTEMPTS = 3; // was 1 before v2.4.1 private static final int WAIT_MS = 5000; public T execute(Supplier<T> op) { for (int i = 0; i < MAX_ATTEMPTS; i++) { try { return op.get(); } catch (TimeoutException e) { Thread.sleep(WAIT_MS); } } } }

files.label: application.yml
files.contentHtml: database: pool: max-connections: 50 # unchanged since ~14 months ago timeout-ms: 30000

docs.title: Checkout service overview
docs.body: checkout-api receives order requests, calls out to the payment provider via PaymentClient, and persists the order once payment is confirmed. It shares a single database connection pool across all endpoints (max 50 connections).

docs.title: Retry policy
docs.body: Payment calls are retried up to 3 times on timeout, with a fixed 5-second wait per attempt. Retries currently hold their database connection open for the entire retry sequence rather than releasing it between attempts.

docs.title: Known limitations
docs.body: The connection pool size was last tuned over a year ago, before checkout volume roughly tripled. There's an open ticket to move to a per-request-scoped connection instead of holding one for the whole retry loop.

deployments.message: Increase payment timeout retry attempts from 1 to 3
